---
name: Improve content
about: Suggest improvements or report an error in the documentation content
title: '[Content] '
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Link to the affected page**

Provide the URL on `docs.tolka.health` where the issue appears.

**Describe what needs improvement**

Detail the error, omission, or suggested improvement. If applicable, describe how you would fix it.

**Checklist**

- [ ] The suggested content uses only synthetic medical examples (no real patient scenarios)
- [ ] The suggested content does not include API keys, LLM prompt text, or scoring algorithm details
- [ ] All code examples use placeholder keys (`sk_test_...`, `sk_sandbox_public_...`)

**Additional context**

Screenshots, related pages, or other helpful context.
